title: Buyer amends an authorised PO to change quantity, must re-approve
user_persona: Buyer who needs to revise an already-authorised PO

conversation.user: PO-2026-300 is approved but I need to bump line 2 quantity from 50 to 75.

bot_must: fire POAMDENTTRN1 (Search) with po_number=PO-2026-300 on entry screen
report PO found and current status (Authorised)
note that amending will move status back to Draft and require re-approval
load main amend screen (POAMDMAIN) with PO data
compute new line value and total PO value
ask if user wants to Submit (re-approval needed) or Amend+Approve (if user has rights)

conversation.user: I have approval rights, do amend and approve in one go.

evaluation_metrics.status_warning_at_turn_1: bot warns that amend reverts to Draft + needs re-approval
